project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

context.role: Displays game over state, final score, high score, and restart instructions
context.screen_position: Center of screen at (300px, 75px), all text center-aligned
context.usage_scenario: Appears immediately when player collides with obstacle, shows final score and high score comparison, prompts for restart with Space key

visual_specification.shape: Multi-line centered text layout with 4 main elements
visual_specification.texture: monospace pixel font, crisp pixel rendering

animation.description: Appears instantly on game over, optional 0.5-second blink on 'Press SPACE to restart' text

visual_specification.details: Four text elements vertically stacked: 1) 'GAME OVER' at 24px font, y offset -30px from center, 2) 'Score: XXXXX' at 16px font, y offset 0, 3) 'HI XXXXX' at 16px font, y offset +20px, 4) 'Press SPACE to restart' at 12px font, y offset +50px. Optional 'NEW RECORD' message at 18px if high score beaten. All center-aligned at x=300px.

relationships.shared_with: Same font style and primary color as score_display, appears when player_dead state is triggered
relationships.differences_from: score_display is single-line 16px always visible, game_over_screen is multi-line with varying sizes (12px, 16px, 24px) and only visible on death

explicit_negations: no additional colors beyond #535353 (and optional #FF0000 for new record)
no smooth font rendering (pixel font only)
no buttons or clickable UI elements
no score count-up animation (shows final value immediately)
